description:
The Somborne neighbourhood is predominantly rural with the main and largest village being Kings Somborne and smaller villages of Little Somborne, Up Somborne, Ashley and Brook.
Kings Somborne is located to the West of Winchester and approximately 3 miles from Stockbridge. It has good communication links being on the A3057 between Stockbridge and Romsey and has good links to the M3, M27 and A303. There are 2 bus services which operate within the area linking with Salisbury, Stockbridge, Winchester and Broughton. The nearest train station is at Dunbridge, 3 miles away.
Kings Somborne has a Primary school, Post office, Shop, Church, 3 licenced premises and recreation ground. There is a Parish church and Methodist church.
Kings Somborne has approximately 600 houses and a population of approximately 1600 of which only 370 are under 20.
Therre is very little in the way of bussiness in the area and what little there is is connected to agriculture.
